race.comment: The well-related BILLY BOOM (3) (half to G3 winner Metalart) returns from a spell of four-and-a-half months and is having his first run for a new yard. Finished fifth at Sunshine Coast over 1000m when first-up last time in work. Will be fit enough for this following a recent trial win and expecting a seamless transition. CRAIGLEA MONNIE (11) registered her first win last start over 800m at this track, getting home by 1.2 lengths. Serious contender again with the confidence high. STELLA BOO (4) returns from a spell of six months and did win first-up last time in work over 800m at this circuit. Solid chance while fresh. LITTLE FREDDY (7) last raced just nine days ago when fifth over 1075m here. Suitably placed so anticipating a better run this time.
